chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 514 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing of case 1. For hearing of CMA No.2153 of 2020. 2. For hearing of main case. 13-05-2025 Mr. Manzar Hussain Memon, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Deputy Attorney General along with Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel, the purpose of this petition has been served; hence, it may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
